title: fordia lanceolata
intro: Fordia lanceolata, also known as the lance-leaved fordia, is a plant species native to Malaysia and Indonesia. It is a shrub or small tree that has been traditionally used in medicine for its analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The medicinal properties of Fordia lanceolata have been found to have health benefits such as reducing pain and inflammation, and treating wounds and skin conditions. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies like teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
